title: CobbleAPI
description: CobbleAPI adds essential commands like TPA, TPHere, RTP, Sethome and fast teleports to the Nether, End and Overworld for players with permissions.
body:
# 🧱 CobbleAPI – The ultimate API for adding simple and powerful utility commands!
# 
CobbleAPI is a Minecraft mod designed to enhance the player experience with a collection of teleportation commands and handy tools. Whether it's for fast travel, managing home points, or easily accessing dimensions, CobbleAPI makes the game smoother and more enjoyable for all players with the necessary permissions.

## **✨ Main Features**
- 🔁 TPA – Send teleportation requests to other players.
- 🎯 TPHere – Teleport a player directly to you.
- 🎲 RTP – Safe random teleportation within the world.
- 🏠 Sethome – Create and manage your home points.
- 🌍 TP Overworld – Instant access to the main world.
- 🔥 TP Nether – Fast teleportation to the Nether.
- 🌌 TP End – Join the End in a flash.

🔧 Designed to be simple, lightweight, configurable, and compatible with modded environments.
New utility commands and improvements are planned to further enhance CobbleAPI.
